details.test: Task 1: Select cheapest qualifying fiber plan and add to cart
Task 2: Configure SD-WAN solution under budget and add to quote
Task 3: Create mobile fleet configuration and add to cart
Task 4: Configure 12-user VoIP system with 4 call center seats and call recording
Task 5: Schedule standard installation within 30 days (morning window)
Task 6: Select managed firewall tier with IPS and 24/7 monitoring under $300
Task 7: Use coverage checker and add primary and backup internet services to quote
Task 8: Submit high-priority network outage support ticket
Task 9: Upgrade 100 Mbps internet service to next faster tier under $400 with add-ons
